description: Template schema for generating social media profiles from entity definitions

bio.description: Short biography summarizing the entity's identity and focus

topics.description: List of primary topics the profile covers

follower_persona.description: Description of the typical follower demographic

posting_style.description: Tone and style of posts (e.g., analytical, casual, data-driven)

key_narratives.description: Core narratives or themes the profile promotes

linked_entities.description: Related entities referenced in the profile
